items.title: Hannes Steinbach played power forward at U-Dub. Both Miles Bridges and Grant Williams have one year left on their deals, and the clock is on for 2024 lottery pick Tidjane Salaun.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Hannes Steinbach played power forward at U-Dub. Both Miles Bridges and Grant Williams have one year left on their deals, and the clock is on for 2024 lottery pick Tidjane Salaun.

As a potential center option, Steinbach offers a lot more offensively than Moussa Diabaté or Ryan Kalkbrenner.
